data.name: Subtitle
data.value: Each ministry has a different purpose, but they all share the same mission: serving God and our community with love and dedication.

data.name: SabbathSchoolDescription
data.value: Systematic Bible study every Sabbath with classes for all ages led by dedicated teachers.

data.name: YouthDescription
data.value: A ministry for Adventist youth featuring spiritual, social, and missionary activities.

data.name: HealthDescription
data.value: Promoting physical, mental, and spiritual well-being through preventive health programs.

data.name: ChildrenDescription
data.value: Specialized care and Bible teaching for children through age-appropriate activities.

data.name: PrayerDescription
data.value: Interceding in prayer for the needs of the church and the community. United in prayer.

data.name: ADRADescription
data.value: A Christian humanitarian ministry providing help and hope to our community through outreach projects and donations.
